title: Pure Functions, Immutability, and Data Copies · Equational Recall
summary: Repair a pricing pipeline where aliases mutate shared orders during validation. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a pure price transformation with alias-safety tests after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Write deterministic pure functions whose outputs and failures depend only on explicit inputs.
Predict mutation through shared aliases in nested Python containers.
Return updated immutable records while preserving unchanged data and input values.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""python-functional immutable transformation portfolio."""
